# SportBuddies Core Engine API

Backend API for the SportBuddies platform (court owners + players).
Optimized for developer integration and AI tool calling.

## API Entrypoints
- OpenAPI Spec (JSON): [/api/schema/](/api/schema/) — import this into LLM system tools / SDK generators.
- Interactive Playground (Swagger): [/api/docs/swagger/](/api/docs/swagger/) — for manual browser testing.
- Reference Docs (Redoc): [/api/docs/redoc/](/api/docs/redoc/) — clean reading view.

## Authentication
- All `/api/players/*` endpoints require a Supabase-issued JWT:
  `Authorization: Bearer <ACCESS_TOKEN>`.
- Obtain tokens via `POST /auth/player/login` or `POST /auth/owner/login`.
- Refresh an expired access token via `POST /auth/refresh`.
- Auth endpoints under `/auth/*` are public (no Bearer token required).

## Rules for AI Agents
- Player endpoints require `role=player` in the JWT; a mismatched role returns `403`.
- Every failure returns a top-level `error` key (often with a human-readable `detail`).
- Login/forgot-password errors are intentionally generic to prevent user enumeration.
- `POST /auth/player/resend-verification` is rate limited to 1 request/minute per email;
  expect `429` with a `retry_after` (seconds) field on breach.
- Avatar upload accepts only JPEG/PNG up to 2 MB via `multipart/form-data`.

## Endpoint Groups
- `Auth` — `/auth/owner/*`, `/auth/player/*`, `/auth/refresh`, `/auth/callback` (public).
- `Players` — `/api/players/me*` (authenticated, role=player).
- `Courts` — `/api/courts/*`: list/detail (public GET), create/update/delete & settings (owner).
- `Slots` — `/api/courts/slots*`, `/api/slots/*`, `/api/slot-join-requests/*`: availability,
  blocking, recurrence, and play-together join requests. Public reads; owner/player writes.
- `Bookings` — `/api/bookings*`: single + manual/walk-in booking, status transitions, price estimate.

Series and notifications endpoints are not yet documented in the OpenAPI spec.

## Health
- `GET /health/` — unauthenticated liveness/readiness probe (`200` ok, `503` degraded).
